basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT Mandi is recruiting 01 Project Assistant for a project on photostrictive composite actuator design, analysis, and development. B.E./B.Tech./M.Sc. degree holders in relevant engineering fields can apply.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | job responsibilities: Design, analysis, and development of photostrictive composite actuator
qualification.education_qualification: B.E./ B.Tech. /M.Sc. degree in Materials/ Ceramics /Mechanical/chemical /Aerospace Engineering

vacancy_details.Consolidated Pay-slab / Salary: Rs. 20,000 p.m. plus HRA as applicable
vacancy_details.Qualifications: B.E./ B.Tech. /M.Sc. degree in Materials/ Ceramics /Mechanical/chemical /Aerospace Engineering

post_wise_breakdown.consolidated_pay_slab_salary: Rs. 20,000 p.m. plus HRA as applicable
post_wise_breakdown.qualifications: B.E./ B.Tech. /M.Sc. degree in Materials/ Ceramics /Mechanical/chemical /Aerospace Engineering

selection_process: IIT Mandi reserves the right to fix higher criteria for shortlisting of eligible candidates. The name of the shortlisted candidates will be either displayed on website or communicated individually along with the offline/online interview details. Selection will be based on performance in the interview.
how_to_apply: Interested candidates are requested to submit detailed Curriculum Vitae (CV) with personal details, academic qualifications (including percentage of marks/division), publications, work experience, and the names, affiliations, email addresses, and mobile numbers of two referees. The CV should be sent by email to the Principal Investigator, Dr. Rajeev Kumar, at [email protected], with the Advertisement Number clearly mentioned in the subject line. Last Date: 19 July 2026 by 5:00 p.m.
important_instructions: The appointment is temporary with consolidated salary. Relaxation shall be granted to SC/ST/OBC candidates as per GoI norms. In case of selection of a retired/superannuated government employee, salary will be fixed as per prevailing GoI rules. IIT Mandi reserves the right to fix higher criteria for shortlisting.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: IIT Mandi invites applications from Indian nationals for project appointment under the AR&DB-funded project on temporary basis with consolidated salary. The renewal of services will be based on satisfactory performance.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Mandi is recruiting 01 Project Assistant for a project on photostrictive composite actuator design, analysis, and development. B.E./B.Tech./M.Sc. degree holders in relevant engineering fields can apply.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Mandi Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the CV by email is 19 July 2026 by 5:00 p.m.

faq.question: Q2. How many Project Assistant vacancies are available at IIT Mandi?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy for Project Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Assistant at IIT Mandi?
faq.answer: Rs. 20,000 p.m. plus HRA as applicable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for IIT Mandi Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: B.E./ B.Tech. /M.Sc. degree in Materials/ Ceramics /Mechanical/chemical /Aerospace Engineering.

faq.question: Q5. What is the project title for the position at IIT Mandi?
faq.answer: “Design, analysis and development of photostrictive composite actuator”.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for IIT Mandi Project Assistant vacancy?
faq.answer: Send detailed CV to [email protected] with the Advertisement Number in the subject line by 19 July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What funding agency is supporting the project at IIT Mandi?
faq.answer: Aeronautics Research & Development Board (AR&DB).

faq.question: Q8. Is the Project Assistant position at IIT Mandi temporary?
faq.answer: Yes, the appointment is temporary with consolidated salary, renewable based on performance.

faq.question: Q9. Who are the Project Investigators for the AR&DB project at IIT Mandi?
faq.answer: Who are the Project Investigators for the AR&DB project at IIT Mandi?

faq.question: Q10. Can SC/ST/OBC candidates get relaxation for IIT Mandi Project Assistant?
faq.answer: Yes, relaxation shall be granted as per GoI norms.
